title: Inception
description: A skilled thief who steals secrets through dream invasion is given a chance at redemption by doing the impossible: planting an idea in someone's mind. A mind-bending thriller that explores dreams within dreams.

title: The Dark Knight
description: When a known threat called the Joker wreaks chaos on Gotham's residents, Batman, James Gordon, and Harvey Dent must work together to end the madness.

title: Zodiac
description: Between 1968 and 1983, a San Francisco cartoonist becomes an amateur detective obsessed with tracking the Zodiac Killer, an unidentified individual terrorizing Northern California with a string of murders.

title: The Invisible Guest
description: A young businessman wakes up locked in a hotel room with his lover's lifeless body beside him. He hires a high-profile lawyer and over one night they work to piece together what happened in a frantic race against time.

title: Interstellar
description: In a dystopian future where Earth is dying, explorers travel through a wormhole to find a new home for humanity. A visually stunning story of love, sacrifice, and the vastness of space.

title: Se7en
description: Two detectives hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his modus operandi. A dark, gripping thriller that dives into the depths of human depravity.
